div1.entryFree: Taffeta, a fine and smooth stuff of silk: beauties no richer than rich t. LLL V, 2, 159. t. phrases, silken terms precise, LLL V, 2, 159 your t. punk, All's II, 2, 23. a snipt t. fellow, IV, 5, 2. the tailor make thy doublet of changeable t. Tw. II, 4, 77. a fair hot wench in flame-coloured t. H4A I, 2, 11.
